channel.title: 至轩的博客 on Zhixuan's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 至轩的博客 on Zhixuan's Blog

item.title: Reading List 2026
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/reading_2026/ -

Deepseek V4

  • DeepSeek-V4: Towards Highly Efficient Million-Token Context Intelligence ✅
  • mHC: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections ✅
  • DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation ✅
  • DFlash: Block Diffusion for Flash Speculative Decoding ✅

GLM 5.2

  • GLM-5: from Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering ✅
  • GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks ✅
  • IndexShare ✅

Others

  • Lil’Log: Scaling Laws, Carefully
  • On-Policy Distillation ✅
  • mini-sglang

vLLM

  • Inside vLLM: Anatomy of a High-Throughput LLM Inference System ⭐️ ✅
  • 透过 vLLM 深入分析一次推理的完整旅程：从 HTTP 请求到 Token 流出 ✅
  • Async scheduling: PR 29957 & 32951
  • vLLM Mooncake KV Connector详解：让KV Cache在GPU之间“瞬移”
- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/reading_2026/ -

item.title: 读书 2026
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/reading_2026/ -

5月

  • 正常人， 萨莉・鲁尼 ✅

6月

  • 机器人之梦 ✅
  • 窄门，纪德 ✅
  • 爱的艺术，爱里希・弗洛姆 ✅
    1. 爱是将一个人生命里的事物给予出去，从而体验到自身的能力和生命的强壮、丰饶。
    2. 爱的元素包括：照顾【在意你】、责任【愿意回应你】、尊重【不占有你】和了解【看见真实的你】。
    3. 爱需要克服自恋，即只按照事物对自己有用或有害来体验它们。它的反面是客观性，是将客观图像和根据一己欲望与恐惧所形成的图像区分开来的能力。

7月

  • 小王子 ✅
  • 撒哈拉的故事，三毛
- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/reading_2026/ -

item.title: vLLM frontend to backend: AsyncLLM and Engine
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/vllm_frontend_backend/ -

分解 vLLM 前端 (AsyncLLM) 和 后端 (EngineCore) 架构。 综合自 博客 Anatomy of vLLM（Aleksa Gordic，2025-09-05）、微信公众号文章 透过 vLLM 深入分析一次推理的完整旅程，以及 vLLM 源码分析（基于 releases/v0.14.0 分支）。

1. HTTP 入口：FastAPI → OpenAIServing → AsyncLLM

1.1 FastAPI Route (vllm/entrypoints/openai/api_server.py:478)

@router.post("/v1/chat/completions", dependencies=[Depends(validate_json_request)])
@with_cancellation
@load_aware_call
async def create_chat_completion(request: ChatCompletionRequest, raw_request: Request):
    handler = chat(raw_request)  # 从 app.state 获取 OpenAIServingChat
    generator = await handler.create_chat_completion(request, raw_request)
    if isinstance(generator, ChatCompletionResponse):
        return JSONResponse(content=generator.model_dump())
    return StreamingResponse(content=generator, media_type="text/event-stream")

1.2 OpenAIServingChat (vllm/entrypoints/openai/serving_chat.py:224)

预处理分为两个阶段：chat template 渲染 + tokenize（_preprocess_chat）和构造引擎请求（_process_inputs）。

async def create_chat_completion(self, request, raw_request=None):
    # 1) 模型检查 + tokenizer 获取
    tokenizer = await self.engine_client.get_tokenizer()
    # 2a) 预处理阶段一：渲染 chat template + 分词
    conversation, engine_prompts = await self._preprocess_chat(
        request, tokenizer, request.messages, ...)
    # 2b) 预处理阶段二：封装为 EngineCoreRequest + 送入引擎
    for i, engine_prompt in enumerate(engine_prompts):
        engine_request, tokenization_kwargs = await self._process_inputs(
            request_id, engine_prompt, sampling_params, ...)
        generator = self.engine_client.generate(
            engine_request, sampling_params, request_id, ...) # type: AsyncGenerator[RequestOutput, None]
    # 3) 包装为 OpenAI 格式的 Response / SSE Stream
    return await self.chat_completion_full_generator(request, result_generator, ...)

  • _preprocess_chat() — Chat Template 渲染 + 分词 → TokensPrompt (serving_engine.py:1166)

  • _process_inputs() — TokensPrompt → EngineCoreRequest (serving_engine.py:1293)

1.3 EngineClient 协议 (vllm/engine/protocol.py)

class EngineClient(ABC):
    """Protocol class for Clients to Engine"""
    vllm_config: VllmConfig
    input_processor: InputProcessor

    @abstractmethod
    def generate(self, prompt, sampling_params, request_id, ...) -> AsyncGenerator[RequestOutput, None]:
        """Generate outputs for a request."""

2. AsyncLLM：前端进程的指挥中心 (vllm/v1/engine/async_llm.py)

2.1 构造函数

class AsyncLLM(EngineClient):
    def __init__(self, vllm_config, executor_class, log_stats, ...):
        # 1) Tokenizer
        self.tokenizer = cached_tokenizer_from_config(model_config)

        # 2) InputProcessor：原始输入 → EngineCoreRequest
        self.input_processor = InputProcessor(vllm_config, tokenizer)

        # 3) OutputProcessor：EngineCoreOutputs → RequestOutput
        self.output_processor = OutputProcessor(tokenizer, log_stats, ...)

        # 4) EngineCoreClient：跨进程通信桥梁（InprocClient / AsyncMPClient / DPLBAsyncMPClient）
        self.engine_core = EngineCoreClient.make_async_mp_client(vllm_config, executor_class, ...)

        # 5) 启动 output_handler 后台 asyncio task
        self._run_output_handler()

2.2 generate()：核心生成流程

async def generate(self, prompt, sampling_params, request_id, ...):
    # 1) 创建 RequestOutputCollector（per-request async queue）
    q = await self.add_request(request_id, prompt, sampling_params, ...)

    # 2) 循环从 queue 中拉取 RequestOutput，yield 给上层
    finished = False
    while not finished:
        out = q.get_nowait() or await q.get()
        finished = out.finished
        yield out  # RequestOutput

2.3 add_request()：请求入队

async def add_request(self, request_id: str, prompt: EngineCoreRequest, ...):
    #
    request = self.input_processor.process_inputs(request_id, prompt, ...)
    self._run_output_handler()
    # 注册到 OutputProcessor（前端进程）
    self.output_processor.add_request(request, prompt, parent_req, index, queue)
    # 发送到 EngineCore（后端进程，ZMQ）
    await self.engine_core.add_request_async(request)
    #
    return queue # type: RequestOutputCollector

请求被同时注册到两个位置：OutputProcessor（前端，管输出）和 EngineCoreClient（后端，管调度执行）。

2.4 output_handler：后台输出泵

async def output_handler():
    while True:
        # 1) 从 EngineCore（ZMQ output socket）拉取 EngineCoreOutputs
        outputs = await engine_core.get_output_async()

        # 2) 分块处理（避免长时间阻塞 event loop）
        for start in range(0, num_outputs, chunk_size):
            outputs_slice = engine_core_outputs[start:end]
            processed = output_processor.process_outputs(outputs_slice, ...)
            # RequestOutputs 被推送到对应 request 的 queue

            # 3) 终止需要 abort 的请求（stop string 命中）
            if processed.reqs_to_abort:
                await engine_core.abort_requests_async(processed.reqs_to_abort)

3. EngineCoreClient：跨进程通信层 (vllm/v1/engine/core_client.py)

3.1 类继承体系

EngineCoreClient (ABC)
├── InprocClient          # 同进程模式（V0 兼容 / 调试用）
│     └── 直接持有 EngineCore 实例，无 ZMQ
├── MPClient (ABC)        # 多进程基类（ZMQ 通信）
│     ├── SyncMPClient    # 同步模式（LLM.generate 离线推理）
│     └── AsyncMPClient   # 异步模式（AsyncLLM 在线服务）
│           ├── DPAsyncMPClient    # 数据并行 + 外部负载均衡
│           └── DPLBAsyncMPClient  # 数据并行 + 内部负载均衡

3.2 MPClient：多进程通信基类

class MPClient(EngineCoreClient):
    def __init__(self, asyncio_mode, vllm_config, executor_class, log_stats, ...):
        # 序列化
        self.encoder = MsgpackEncoder()
        self.decoder = MsgpackDecoder(EngineCoreOutputs)

        # 启动 EngineCore 进程（通过 launch_core_engines）
        engine_manager, coordinator, addresses = launch_core_engines(...)

        # 创建 ZMQ sockets
        self.input_socket = make_zmq_socket(ctx, input_address, zmq.ROUTER, bind=True)
        self.output_socket = make_zmq_socket(ctx, output_address, zmq.PULL)

3.3 AsyncMPClient：生产环境的异步客户端

class AsyncMPClient(MPClient):
    def __init__(self, ...):
        self.outputs_queue = asyncio.Queue[EngineCoreOutputs | Exception]()
        self._ensure_output_queue_task()  # 后台 asyncio task 从 output_socket 读取

    async def get_output_async(self) -> EngineCoreOutputs:
        """被 AsyncLLM.output_handler 调用"""
        return await self.outputs_queue.get()

    async def add_request_async(self, request: EngineCoreRequest) -> None:
        """发送 ADD 请求到 EngineCore"""
        await self._send_input(EngineCoreRequestType.ADD, request)

3.4 DPAsyncMPClient & DPLBAsyncMPClient：DP并行

class DPAsyncMPClient(AsyncMPClient):
    """多 EngineCore 实例，外部负载均衡"""

class DPLBAsyncMPClient(DPAsyncMPClient):
    """多 EngineCore 实例，内部负载均衡"""
    def get_core_engine_for_request(self, request):
        # 从所有 engine 中选择负载最低的
        # score = waiting * 4 + running

3.5 DPCoordinator (vllm/v1/engine/coordinator.py)

DPCoordinator（独立进程，DP > 1 时启动）
├── 收集各 DP engine rank 的 stats（waiting/running counts）
├── 广播 stats 给所有 frontend process（用于 LB 决策）
├── 追踪 "request wave" 和 running state
└── 收到 FIRST_REQ 消息时广播 START_DP_WAVE 唤醒 engines

4. EngineCore & EngineCoreProc：后端进程的引擎核心 (vllm/v1/engine/core.py)

类层次

EngineCore                      # 引擎核心逻辑（调度 + 执行 + 后处理）
└── EngineCoreProc              # ZMQ 封装 → 作为独立进程运行
     └── DPEngineCoreProc       # DP并行 / MoE

EngineCore 构造函数

class EngineCore:
    def __init__(self, vllm_config, executor_class, log_stats, ...):
        # 1) Model Executor（UniProc / MultiProc / RayDistributed）
        self.model_executor = executor_class(vllm_config)
        # 4) Scheduler（FCFS 或 Priority，含 KV cache manager）
        self.scheduler = Scheduler(vllm_config, kv_cache_config, ...)

step()：Schedule -> Execute -> Sample -> Update

EngineCoreProc：ZMQ 封装的进程模式

class EngineCoreProc(EngineCore):
    """ZMQ-wrapper for running EngineCore in background process."""

    def __init__(self, vllm_config, handshake_address, executor_class, ...):
        # 三队列架构
        self.input_queue = queue.Queue()    # 接收来自 input thread 的请求
        self.output_queue = queue.Queue()   # 输出到 output thread

        # 启动 handshake（ZMQ DEALER）
        with self._perform_handshakes(...) as addresses:
            # 初始化父类 EngineCore
            super().__init__(vllm_config, executor_class, ...)

            # input thread：ZMQ input socket → input_queue
            input_thread = threading.Thread(target=self.process_input_sockets, ...)

            # output thread：output_queue → ZMQ output socket
            self.output_thread = threading.Thread(target=self.process_output_sockets, ...)
            
    def run_engine_core(*args, dp_rank: int = 0, local_dp_rank: int = 0, **kwargs):

        engine_core: EngineCoreProc | None = None

        if data_parallel and vllm_config.model_config.is_moe:
            # Set data parallel rank for this engine process.
            parallel_config.data_parallel_rank = dp_rank
            engine_core = DPEngineCoreProc(*args, **kwargs)
        else:
            engine_core = EngineCoreProc(*args, engine_index=dp_rank, **kwargs)

        engine_core.run_busy_loop()

    def run_busy_loop(self):
        while True:
            # 1) 从 input_queue 拉取请求，加入 scheduler
            self._process_input_queue()
            # 2) 执行一步引擎循环
            self._process_engine_step()

5. Executor → Worker ：模型执行层 (vllm/v1/executor/)

5.1 Executor 抽象

class Executor(ABC):
    """An executor is responsible for executing the model on one or more devices."""

    @staticmethod
    def get_class(vllm_config) -> type["Executor"]:
        if backend == "mp":
            return MultiprocExecutor  # 多 GPU（TP/PP），本地 multiprocessing
        elif backend == "ray":
            return RayDistributedExecutor  # 分布式，Ray 编排

    @abstractmethod
    def execute_model(self, scheduler_output, non_block=False):
        """执行一次模型前向 + 采样"""
    @abstractmethod
    def collective_rpc(self, method, timeout, args, kwargs):
        """在所有 worker 上执行 RPC 调用"""

Executor 对比：

Executor Workers 通信方式 适用场景
UniProcExecutor 1 个 Worker（同进程） 直接调用 单 GPU 调试 / 小模型
MultiprocExecutor N 个 Worker（独立进程） rpc_broadcast_mq（共享内存队列） 单机多 GPU（TP/PP）
RayDistributedExecutor N 个 Ray Actor Ray 多机分布式

5.2 MultiprocExecutor：多 GPU 编排

class MultiprocExecutor(Executor):
    def __init__(self, vllm_config):
        # 为每个 rank 创建 WorkerProc 子进程
        for rank in range(world_size):
            WorkerProc.make_worker_process(rank, ...)

    def execute_model(self, scheduler_output, non_block=False):
        return self.collective_rpc(
            "execute_model", 
            args=(scheduler_output),
            ...
        )

6. 完整请求追踪：从 curl 到 token

以下以 POST /v1/chat/completions 为例：

Client: curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/completions ...

  │
  ▼
① FastAPI (api_server.py:490)
  create_chat_completion(request, raw_request)
    → handler = app.state.openai_serving_chat
    → handler.create_chat_completion(request, raw_request)
  │
  ▼
② OpenAIServingChat (serving_chat.py:224)
  create_chat_completion():
    → _preprocess_chat()        # Chat template → tokenize → EngineCoreRequest
    → engine_client.generate()  # → AsyncLLM.generate()
  │
  ▼
③ AsyncLLM.generate() (async_llm.py:389)
    → add_request():
        input_processor.process_inputs()  # → EngineCoreRequest
        output_processor.add_request()    # 注册 output handler 侧状态
        engine_core.add_request_async()   # 发送 ZMQ 消息
    → 循环 yield RequestOutput（从 RequestOutputCollector 拉取）
  │
  ▼  [ZMQ: ADD request via input_socket]
  │
④ EngineCoreProc.process_input_sockets() (core.py:1068)
  input thread: ZMQ recv → msgpack decode → preprocess_add_request()
    preprocess_add_request()
      └─ Request.from_engine_core_request()
    input_queue.put_nowait((ADD, req))
  │
  ▼
⑤ EngineCoreProc.run_busy_loop() (core.py:948)
  _process_input_queue():
    → input_queue.get() → _handle_client_request(ADD)
    → scheduler.add_request(request)  # → waiting queue
  _process_engine_step():
    → step_fn() → EngineCore.step()
  │
  ▼
⑥ EngineCore.step() (core.py:370)
  scheduler.schedule()
    → 遍历 running queue（decode 请求，分配 1 KV block）
    → 遍历 waiting queue（prefill 请求，满足 token budget 时调度）
    → allocate_slots()：从 free_block_queue 分配 KV cache blocks
    → 返回 SchedulerOutput
  │
  ▼
⑦ model_executor.execute_model(scheduler_output)
    → MultiprocExecutor: rpc_broadcast_mq → 各 Worker 进程
    → Worker → GPUModelRunner.execute_model()
  │
  ▼
⑧ scheduler.update_from_output(scheduler_output, model_output)
    → 将 new_token_ids 追加到各 Request
    → check stop conditions（EOS / length / stop string）
    → FINISHED 请求：free KV blocks → 标记完成
    → 构造 EngineCoreOutputs
  │
  ▼
⑨ EngineCoreProc.process_output_sockets() (core.py:1149)
  output thread: output_queue.get() → msgpack encode → ZMQ PUSH
  │
  ▼  [ZMQ: EngineCoreOutputs via output_socket]
  │
⑩ AsyncMPClient.process_outputs_socket()
  ZMQ recv → msgpack decode → outputs_queue.put_nowait()
  │
  ▼
⑪ AsyncLLM output_handler()
  outputs_queue.get() → OutputProcessor.process_outputs()
    → IncrementalDetokenizer：增量反分词
    → LogprobsProcessor：logprobs 计算
    → 构造 RequestOutput → queue.put()（RequestOutputCollector）
  │
  ▼
⑫ AsyncLLM.generate() yield
    → OpenAIServingChat.chat_completion_stream_generator()
        → 转换为 ChatCompletionStreamResponse
        → SSE format: "data: {...}\n\n"
    → StreamingResponse → Client
- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/vllm_frontend_backend/ -

item.title: Attention in vLLM: Cache and Computation
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/adapt_attn/ -

Click to view the presentation slides

- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/adapt_attn/ -

item.title: 2026年7月
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/2607/ -

敬请期待😚

- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/2607/ -

item.title: 2026年5月
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/2605/ -

ZX上一次回广州的家是在春节。5月份他想回家，因为他累了，他想试试开一下许久没有开过的车。他和Jennie & David去扫墓。一个山青水秀的地方，白鹭成群。它们大部分时间栖息在树上，有时候会从一个山头迁徙到另一个山头，起飞、掠过，降落。灵魂安息在这片净土上，而它们是这里的守护神。

每次回家总是有吃不完的鲜美的水果。后来他想知道那时候吃的番石榴在哪里买的，印象中又软又香。

“你是指上次在家里吃的那个吗？那是广东本地的品种，才又香又滑溜。明年夏天回来吃吧。”

“淘宝上有这个品种吗？”

“不会有，这个品种很难存放和运输。所以出了广东就没有了。”

J & D告诉ZX，他们打算重新装修一下已经住了20多年的家。

“你妈考虑这件事情很久了”，D说。

“重新装修以后，我们想把这面墙打掉，原来的书房就和客厅连通了。这样会有更多空间。房间的门我们也想换一个朝向。你觉得怎么样呢？” J问。

这自然没有什么不好的，ZX想着。他觉得一次翻修可以把时间带来的小瑕疵修补掉，但又不至于磨灭20多年来的生活气息。他有点憧憬，想象他在新家中以一种什么样的姿态生活，或许会很惬意。D一如既往地热衷于设计、画图，他给我们展示他用软件画的翻新后的平面图，细致、严谨。

他们又聊了聊J & D年轻时候求学的经历，后来是如何工作、转行。ZX想知道J & D是如何走到一起的，但J似乎一直难以启齿。

ZX把《正常人》的小说读完了，心满意足。

黄永玉画展。一个活了99岁的艺术家，是怎么在他接近生命最后时刻创造出这么轻盈的作品的呢。

ZX的生日通常是二十四节气的“芒种”。一大早他就收到了来自Jennie的祝福，有种有收，似乎每年不外如此。

晚上，Sydney、DJ和CD在ZX的房间。他们吹气球、布置房间、吃喝东西、外放音乐。ZX觉得仿佛他们在举办一个生日派对，这是一个为他举办的生日派对，因为他想不起来一个以他为中心的派对是什么样子的，他在想他人生中是否经历过这样的时刻。他们在他许愿的时候唱起了生日歌。

“这么快就许完了吗？”

“那我再认真许一下。”

他在心中再次默念了他的生日愿望。其实ZX在那天一早就在想怎么安排三个生日愿望，他觉得他已经考虑清楚了。要是有任何人问起，他可以坚定又毫无保留地分享给他人。

S似乎是一个天生的艺术家。她像一位导演一样安排好了现场布置的每一个细节。她有一种天赋，她在脑海中有一种影像，她在等待他人最好看的一面，她为每一个人拍了拍立得。ZX很喜欢她为他拍的一幅单人生日照：他坐在沙发上，戴着生日帽，双手捧着小蛋糕，他浅蓝色的睡衣和旁边粉色的气球营造出一种梦幻温柔的日常感，背景是HAPPY BIRTHDAY的字母气球。

来日再聚。

- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/life/2605/ -

item.title: Scheduler, and KV transfer in disaggregated prefill
item.description:
Zhixuan's Blog https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/scheduler/ -

1. Scheduler

Scheduler (vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py) is the central resource allocator for vLLM’s v1 engine. Each iteration it decides which requests run, how many tokens each gets, and which KV cache blocks to (re-)use. It owns two queues — self.waiting and self.running — plus a KVCacheManager for block allocation. The scheduler has no notion of a distinct “prefill phase” or “decode phase”; every request is simply tracked by num_computed_tokens and num_tokens_with_spec, and the scheduler’s job is to close the gap between the two.

Summary timeline per step

See EngineCore.step():

EngineCore loop:
  scheduler.schedule()
    ├─ allocate KV blocks for running + new requests
    ├─ build SchedulerOutput
    └─ _update_after_schedule()   ← advance num_computed_tokens, clear finished_req_ids

  model_executor.execute_model(scheduler_output)

  model_executor.sample_tokens()

  scheduler.update_from_output(scheduler_output, model_output)
    ├─ adjust num_computed_tokens for rejected spec tokens
    ├─ append new output tokens, check stop
    ├─ free finished requests
    └─ return EngineCoreOutputs to frontend

The split between _update_after_schedule and update_from_output is deliberate: the former eagerly advances token counts (enabling chunked prefill pipelining), while the latter corrects any over-estimates (e.g. spec decoding rejections) once the model result is known.

1.1. add_request — request enters the system

A Request is added to self.waiting queue and registered in self.requests. Status: WAITING.

1.2. schedule() — called each iteration by EngineCore

The main loop runs in two sequential passes, sharing a single token_budget:

token_budget = max_num_scheduled_tokens

Pass 1 — running requests
Pass 2 — waiting requests  (skipped entirely if any preemption occurred in Pass 1)

Pass 1: running requests

Iterates self.running in priority order. For each request, the number of new tokens to schedule is:

num_new_tokens = request.num_tokens_with_spec \
               + request.num_output_placeholders \
               - request.num_computed_tokens

num_tokens_with_spec includes any speculative draft tokens, so this correctly handles both ordinary decoding (gap = 1) and chunked prefill continuation (gap = many).

KV block allocation and preemption. Omitted. See the posts on KV cache / model runner.

Pass 2: waiting requests

Skipped entirely if any preemption happened in Pass 1 (to avoid starving running requests further). Otherwise, pops from self.waiting in order. Several checks can cause a request to be deferred (re-inserted at the head of the queue via skipped_waiting_requests) rather than scheduled:

  • WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS: KV transfer from a remote prefill node is still in flight. The request is skipped until finished_recving_kv_req_ids signals completion.

For requests that pass these checks, the scheduler resolves the prefix cache hit count:

# Local prefix cache hit
new_computed_blocks, num_local_hit = kv_cache_manager.get_computed_blocks(request)

# Remote prefix cache hit (KV connector, e.g. P/D disaggregation)
ext_tokens, load_kv_async = connector.get_num_new_matched_tokens(request, num_local_hit)

num_computed_tokens = num_local_hit + ext_tokens
num_new_tokens = request.num_tokens - num_computed_tokens

If load_kv_async is True (the remote blocks aren’t available yet), the scheduler allocates KV memory speculatively, transitions the request to WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS, and skips it to the next step.

Output construction

After both passes, a SchedulerOutput is assembled with:

  • scheduled_new_reqs / scheduled_resumed_reqs / scheduled_running_reqs
  • num_scheduled_tokens per request
  • req_to_new_blocks — block assignments for the model runner
  • preempted_req_ids — so workers can free cached state
  • finished_req_ids — requests that completed since the previous step

_update_after_schedule is then called to advance each request’s num_computed_tokens by the scheduled amount, enabling the next step’s scheduling to see the updated positions without waiting for the model.

1.3. Model execution (outside Scheduler)

EngineCore calls model_executor.execute_model(scheduler_output). Workers run the model and produce a ModelRunnerOutput.

1.4. update_from_output(scheduler_output, model_runner_output)

This is where the scheduler reconciles with what the model actually produced:

  1. Handles failed KV loads (_handle_invalid_blocks) — adjusts num_computed_tokens back for affected requests.
  2. For each scheduled request (iterating num_scheduled_tokens):
    • Gets the sampled/generated token IDs from model_runner_output
    • Spec decoding correction: if draft tokens were rejected, decrements request.num_computed_tokens by num_rejected (undoing the over-advancement from _update_after_schedule)
    • Calls _update_request_with_output() to append new tokens and check stop conditions
    • If stopped: calls _free_request() to release KV blocks, moves request out of self.running
    • Builds EngineCoreOutput per client
  3. Processes finished KV transfers (_update_from_kv_xfer_finished)
  4. Publishes KV cache events
  5. Returns EngineCoreOutputs (tokens, logprobs, finish reasons) to the engine

1.5. Disaggregation

Prefill

A waiting request is scheduled with load_kv_async=False and its connector metadata built.

Decode (3 rounds)

  • Round 1: the waiting request is scheduled with num_ext_tokens > 0 and load_kv_async=True; its status is set to WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS. start_load_kv is triggered by the model executor.
  • Round 2: the request parks as WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS. When the transfer completes, update_from_output signals the scheduler via finished_recving_kv_req_ids.
  • Round 3: _update_waiting_for_remote_kv caches the received blocks, sets num_computed_tokens, and the request is scheduled normally as a running request.

2. Disaggregated Prefill

In standard (aggregated) inference, every GPU does both prefill (processing the full prompt) and decode (generating one token at a time). The problem is that these two phases have very different compute profiles: prefill is compute-bound (long sequences), decode is memory-bandwidth-bound (single tokens). Running them together causes head-of-line blocking and GPU underutilization.

Disaggregated prefill splits these into separate nodes. A prefill node runs the full forward pass over the prompt, then ships its KV cache to a decode node, which starts autoregressive generation from that already-computed state.

2.1. Connector Interface: KVConnectorBase_V1

vllm/distributed/kv_transfer/kv_connector/v1/base.py

The abstract base class. Every connector implements two distinct sides:

Scheduler side (runs in the scheduler process, no tensors, pure planning):

Method Purpose
get_num_new_matched_tokens(request, computed) Tell the scheduler how many tokens can be claimed from a remote prefill
update_state_after_alloc(request, blocks, n) Record which blocks were allocated for incoming KV
build_connector_meta(scheduler_output) Package per-step metadata to ship to workers
request_finished(request, block_ids) Optionally defer block freeing until async send completes

Worker side (runs in the GPU worker process, operates on tensors):

Method Purpose
start_load_kv(forward_context) Begin async KV receives (consumer)
wait_for_layer_load(layer_name) Sync point before using a received layer’s KV
save_kv_layer(layer_name, kv_cache, attn_metadata) Async-send a layer’s KV (producer)
wait_for_save() Sync point after all layers are forwarded
get_finished(...) Report which requests finished sending/receiving

The scheduler-side / worker-side split mirrors vLLM v1’s process boundary: the scheduler manipulates block tables and request queues, while workers touch GPU memory.

2.2. Scheduler Integration

vllm/v1/core/sched/scheduler.py

The scheduler instantiates the connector with KVConnectorRole.SCHEDULER and calls it at three points per scheduling step:

  1. Token counting — get_num_new_matched_tokens() lets a consumer claim up to len(prompt) - 1 tokens as “already computed” (coming from the prefill node), avoiding redundant recomputation.
  2. Metadata building — after scheduling decisions, build_connector_meta() packages which requests need sends/receives this step.
  3. Completion — request_finished() lets the connector optionally defer freeing KV blocks until async sends complete.

The scheduler also processes worker feedback: when finished_recving reports a request is fully loaded, it transitions that request from WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS → ready to schedule for decode.

2.3. Worker Integration

vllm/v1/worker/kv_connector_model_runner_mixin.py vllm/attention/utils/kv_transfer_utils.py

KVConnectorModelRunnerMixin wraps each forward pass:

connector.bind_connector_metadata(metadata)
connector.start_load_kv(forward_context)   # kick off async recvs
try:
    # ... model forward pass ...
finally:
    connector.wait_for_save()              # drain async sends
    output.finished_sending, output.finished_recving = connector.get_finished(...)
    connector.clear_connector_metadata()

Each attention layer is wrapped by maybe_transfer_kv_layer (a decorator in kv_transfer_utils.py):

connector.wait_for_layer_load(layer_name)  # wait for this layer's KV
result = attention_forward(...)            # use received KV or compute fresh
connector.save_kv_layer(layer_name, ...)   # send this layer's KV

This per-layer interleaving is the intended design: KV sending and the model forward pass can overlap in time, hiding transfer latency.

2.4. Async KV Transfer Lifecycle (Decode Node)

The actual transfer does not start when request.status = WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS is set. That only parks the request. The transfer is kicked off on the next execute_model call.

Scheduler step N:
  get_num_new_matched_tokens()        -> (N tokens, async=True)
  kv_cache_manager.allocate_blocks()  # reserve destination blocks
  connector.update_state_after_alloc()# register blocks with connector
  request.status = WAITING_FOR_REMOTE_KVS  # park the request
  build_connector_meta()              # serialize pending ops into metadata

execute_model (step N):
  connector.bind_connector_metadata() # load the metadata
  connector.start_load_kv()           # << transfer actually starts here
  [GPU forward pass for other requests] # overlaps with the transfer
  connector.get_finished()            # poll: which transfers completed?

Scheduler step N+1 (or later):
  _update_waiting_for_remote_kv()     # sees request in finished_recving_kv_req_ids
  kv_cache_manager.cache_blocks()
  request.num_computed_tokens = N     # now > 0
  request.status = WAITING            # re-enters scheduling via the else-branch

The else branch in scheduler.py:548 is only reached on the second scheduling attempt after num_computed_tokens has been written by _update_waiting_for_remote_kv. It skips get_computed_blocks entirely — the blocks are already allocated and cached — and schedules only the residual tokens beyond the received KV prefix.

2.5. Note on omni-npu

omni-npu is an out-of-tree vLLM platform plugin for Ascend NPUs. It implements the KV connector interface as LLMDataDistConnector (omni_npu/connector/llmdatadist_connector_v1.py), which splits into four internal classes depending on the node role:

Class Role
PrefillConnectorScheduler Scheduler side on prefill node
PrefillConnectorWorker Worker side on prefill node
DecodeConnectorScheduler Scheduler side on decode node
DecodeConnectorWorker Worker side on decode node

Bulk transfer, not per-layer. The per-layer interleaving methods — wait_for_layer_load, save_kv_layer, and wait_for_save — are all no-ops in LLMDataDistConnector. Instead, the entire KV cache is transferred as a single bulk operation inside start_load_kv. On the decode side, DecodeConnectorWorker.start_load_kv() submits one ThreadPoolExecutor job per request; each job calls datadist_manager.pull_kv(), which issues an RDMA pull over RoCE (via the llm_datadist C++ library). Because the transfer is not interleaved with the forward pass, the decode GPU idles during the transfer step rather than overlapping work.

Scheduler-side flow (decode node). DecodeConnectorScheduler.get_num_new_matched_tokens() returns (len(prompt) - 1, True) for any new decode request, telling the scheduler to treat the entire prompt as externally computed and request an async load. After kv_cache_manager.allocate_slots(), update_state_after_alloc() records the request in _reqs_need_recv. build_connector_meta() then converts that list into a DatadistConnectorMetadata containing, per request:

  • local_block_ids — where to write the pulled KV on the decode node
  • remote_block_ids / remote_host / remote_cluster_id — where to read from on the prefill node
  • kv_transfer_params — additional routing info (DP rank, PP partition)

Block lifetime on the prefill node. PrefillConnectorScheduler.request_finished() returns delay_free_blocks=True, so the scheduler does not immediately release the prefill’s KV blocks. Instead, PrefillConnectorWorker keeps them alive until the decode node confirms receipt via a ZMQ message. The maximum hold time is BLOCK_RELEASE_DELAY = 600 s.

- https://zhixuan-zxli.github.io/llm/scheduler/ -
